title: Create: More Renewable
description: Adds more recipes using create machines
body:
## Info

This mod adds many recipes to help automate items. Recipes are listed below.  
Some recipes may be unbalanced or conflict with other mods/addons and changes may occur. Please report any glitches that you find in the mod.


This mod will probably not be updated to newer MC versions.
## Links

Inspired by the Create: Renewables datapack. You can check it out [here](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/create-renewables/).

**Really recommended** to use JEI or other recipe viewing mods for all the recipes. You can get it [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei).

This mod also requires the Create mod, you can get it [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/create).

## some RECIPES
- Ore blocks and deepslate ore blocks can be obtained by mixing stone / deepslate and their relative mineral block *(while being heated)*.\
(For example, mixing coal block and stone gives coal ore.)
- Some recipes may require more than one mineral block.
- Nether gold ore / quartz ore can be obtained by mixing netherrack with gold block / quartz blocks
- Lapis lazuli can be obtained by crushing diamonds.
- Diamonds can be duplicated with zinc, gold and coal blocks. *(crafting grid)*
- Blaze rods can be made from sticks, blaze powder and flint.\
*(Crushing blaze rods can give you more than 3 blaze powder, so this recipe can basically duplicate blaze rods)*
- Crushing scorchia gives emeralds.
- Mixing stone and zinc gives asurine. *(heated)*
- Mixing stone and limestone gives calcite. *(no heat required)*
- Mixing stone and iron gives crimsite. *(heated)*
- Mixing stone and gold gives ochrum. *(heated)*
- Mixing stone and copper gives veridium. *(heated)*
- Mixing stone and clay balls give dripstone block. *(heated)*
- Mixing cobblestone, stone, gravel and deepslate gives tuff. *(heated)*\
*(Tuff can be crushed into zinc and copper.)*
- Compacting cobblestone with lava gives cobbled deepslate.
- Netherrack from haunting infested deepslate.
- Elytras can be crafted with netherite *(craftable)*, phantom membranes *(craftable)* and feathers.
